name: eglot-python-preset
description: Python LSP preset for Emacs using Eglot

scripts.check:melpa:all: bun run check && bun run check:doc && bun run check:package-lint && bun run check:melpa:install && bun run test:all
scripts.init: bun run up && bun run init:hooks
scripts.test:all: bun run test && bun run test:live
scripts.test:live:sequential: emacs -Q --batch -l eglot-python-preset.el -l test/test.el --eval "(setq my-test-run-live-tests t)" -f ert-run-tests-batch-and-exit
scripts.up: mise use -g bun@latest && mise install && bun install && uv sync
